issues.title: Enable use of a models 'json mode' when doing conversation to a Java entity.
issues.body: Currently the converters are using text to coerce the response to json, it can be more deterministic with using json mode for models that support it.

issues.title: [EPIC] - Add @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true) to all response object
issues.body:
Be more flexibility in what we receive, allowing for extra fields that may be added in model responses.  These are records in the various `*Api.java` classes.

- [x] OpenAI
- [x] Anthropic

... etc.

issues.title: When adding the defaultTool tool callback mcp tool in 1.0.0-M7 and 1.0.0-M8, an error occurs. The used version is springai-openai.
issues.body:
Please do a quick search on GitHub issues first, there might be already a duplicate issue for the one you are about to create.
If the bug is trivial, just go ahead and create the issue. Otherwise, please take a few moments and fill in the following sections:

**Bug description**
1.0.0-M7ÕÆī1.0.0-M8Õ£©µĘ╗ÕŖĀdefaultToolÕĘźÕģĘÕø×Ķ░āmcpÕĘźÕģĘńÜäµŚČÕĆÖ’╝īµŖźķöÖ’╝īõĮ┐ńö©µś»ńÜäspringai-openai

Caused by: com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.MismatchedInputException: Cannot deserialize value of type `java.lang.String` from Object value (token `JsonToken.START_OBJECT`)
 at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 689] (through reference chain: org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion["choices"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion$Choice["message"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage["tool_calls"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ToolCall["function"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ChatCompletionFunction["arguments"])

**Environment**
1.0.0-M7ÕÆī1.0.0-M8Õ£©µĘ╗ÕŖĀdefaultToolÕĘźÕģĘÕø×Ķ░āmcpÕĘźÕģĘńÜäµŚČÕĆÖ’╝īµŖźķöÖ’╝īõĮ┐ńö©µś»ńÜäspringai-openai ,jdk17 ,springboot3.24

**Steps to reproduce**
@Bean
    public ChatClient chatClient(OpenAiChatModel siliconflowChatModel, ToolCallbackProvider mcpTools) {
        return ChatClient.builder(siliconflowChatModel).defaultToolCallbacks(mcpTools).build();
    }

**Expected behavior**
õĖŹĶ░āńö©ÕĘźÕģĘµŁŻÕĖĖ’╝īĶ░āńö©mcpÕĘźÕģĘµŖźķöÖ

**Minimal Complete Reproducible example**
Please provide a failing test or a minimal complete verifiable example that reproduces the issue.
Bug reports that are reproducible will take priority in resolution over reports that are not reproducible.
